title: OPTCL Notification 2026 - Apply Offline for 02 Consultant Posts
description: The Odisha Power Transmission Corporation Limited (OPTCL) has officially released the notification to fill the vacancies for 02 Consultant Posts. Interested and eligibile candidates can use this opportunity to apply for these posts before the last date of application. Candidates who have completed their B.E./B. Tech in Electrical Engineering, and B.Sc. can apply for the OPTCL Notification 2026 . The interested applicants can apply in offline mode. Here we have mentioned the education details,...
